name: Atlantean Heavy Infantry
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>海</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>皇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>重</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>装</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>兵</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>へい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Heavy Infantry of the Sea Emperor
desc: During your Main Phase, you can Normal Summon 1 Level 4 or lower Sea Serpent monster in addition to your Normal Summon/Set. (You can only gain this effect once per turn.) If this card is sent to the GY to activate a WATER monster's effect: Target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; destroy that target.
mnst_eff: During your Main Phase, you can Normal Summon 1 Level 4 or lower Sea Serpent monster in addition to your Normal Summon/Set. (You can only gain this effect once per turn.) If this card is sent to the GY to activate a WATER monster's effect: Target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; destroy that target.
eff: During your Main Phase, you can Normal Summon 1 Level 4 or lower Sea Serpent monster in addition to your Normal Summon/Set. (You can only gain this effect once per turn.) If this card is sent to the GY to activate a WATER monster's effect: Target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; destroy that target.

sets.set: Realm of the Sea Emperor Structure Deck

action: Activates if sent to the Graveyard for cost
mst: Destroys your opponent's face-up Monster Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-up Spell Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-up Trap Cards
misc: Gain this effect once per turn
